records.ety: [F. surikate, from the native name in South Africa.]

defs: A South African mongooselike viverrine (Suricata suricatta or Suricata tetradactyla) having a lemurlike face and only four toes; called also mierkat, yellow mongoose and zenick.
notes: The animal called zenick seems also to be related to or identical to the mierkat, but no reference can be found on the internet.
